parameters.name: attrclass
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: useinputrange
parameters.label: Use Input Range
parameters.description: Specify teh range of the input attribute values. Default range is 0 to the number of bins.

parameters.name: outputbinval
parameters.label: Output Bin Value
parameters.description: Whether to output a separate attribute with the bin values, when using an input range.

parameters.name: quantize
parameters.label: Quantize
parameters.description: Convert values into a finite set of discrete levels.

parameters.name: outsiderange
parameters.label: Outside Range
parameters.description: Determines the behavior outside the input range.

parameters.name: numbins
parameters.label: Number of Bins
parameters.description: The number of bins to sort the attribute values in.

parameters.name: countattr
parameters.label: Count Attribute
parameters.description: Sets the attribute scope when outputting the count attribute

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

examples.label: Configure inputattrscope and Use Input Range
examples.code:
n = op('histogram1')
n.par.inputattrscope = 'P(1)'
n.par.useinputrange = True
n.par.inputrangemin = 0
examples.description: Common settings from 12 real Derivative examples
